services.title: CREATIVE PRODUCTION
services.description: We bring ideas to life, from the first conversation to the final frame.

services.title: BRANDING
services.description: Your brand should feel like you - we make sure it does.

services.title: SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT
services.description: Content that actually connects with the people you're trying to reach.

faqs.question: WHAT MAKES STUDIO COBALT DIFFERENT?
faqs.answer: We're storytellers first. A lot of agencies will give you something that looks good - we make sure it actually means something and gets results. We know what works, we know your market, and we'll be straight with you about what will make you competitive.

faqs.question: WHAT DOES A SHOOT LOOK LIKE WITH TEAM COBALT?
faqs.answer: We keep it personal. Before anything goes in front of a camera, we get to know your brand, your people, and what you want to say. On the day, we handle everything - direction, styling, logistics - so you can just show up and be yourself. Afterwards, you get edited content ready to use.

faqs.question: WHAT'S INCLUDED IN YOUR BRANDING SERVICE?
faqs.answer: Every branding project is tailored, but typically includes strategy, logo design, colour palette, typography, and brand guidelines you can actually use.

faqs.question: WHAT KIND OF PROJECTS DO YOU TAKE ON?
faqs.answer: Branding and content creation are our core, but we're always open to a conversation. If you've got a project and you're not sure where we fit, reach out - we'll figure it out together.

faqs.question: WHAT DO YOU NEED FROM US TO KICK OFF?
faqs.answer: A rough idea of what you're after is always a great starting point - even if it's just a feeling or a direction. But if you're not there yet, don't worry. That's what the first conversation is for, and we're good at helping you find it.
